axe_findings.title: `[role]`s are not contained by their required parent element
axe_findings.description: Some ARIA child roles must be contained by specific parent roles to properly perform their intended accessibility functions. [Learn more about ARIA roles and required parent element](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/aria-required-parent).

items.snippet: <button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-1833879141" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-1833879141">
items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  Required ARIA parent role not present: tablist

items.snippet: <button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-1498488894" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-1498488894">

axe_findings.title: Buttons do not have an accessible name
axe_findings.description: When a button doesn't have an accessible name, screen readers announce it as "button", making it unusable for users who rely on screen readers. [Learn how to make buttons more accessible](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/button-name).

items.snippet: <button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-1833879141" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-1833879141">
items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute
  Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  Element does not have an explicit <label>
  Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

axe_findings.title: Links rely on color to be distinguishable.
axe_findings.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. Link text that is discernible improves the experience for users with low vision. [Learn how to make links distinguishable](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/link-in-text-block).

items.snippet: <a href="https://www.hhs.gov/" class="ext" data-extlink="" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer">
items.node_label: Department of Health and Human Services
items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 1.31:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #dfe1e2, surrounding text: #ffffff)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

axe_findings.title: Touch targets do not have sufficient size or spacing.
axe_findings.description: Touch targets with sufficient size and spacing help users who may have difficulty targeting small controls to activate the targets. [Learn more about touch targets](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/target-size).

items.snippet: <a href="https://www.hhs.gov" class="external" target="_blank">
items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size because it is partially obscured (smallest space is 59.4px by 19.2px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 15.8px instead of at least 24px.

axe_findings.title: Document does not have a main landmark.
axe_findings.description: One main landmark helps screen reader users navigate a web page. [Learn more about landmarks](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/landmark-one-main).

items.snippet: <html lang="en" data-react-helmet="lang">
items.explanation:
Fix all of the following:
  Document does not have a main landmark

axe_findings.title: Elements with visible text labels do not have matching accessible names.
axe_findings.description: Visible text labels that do not match the accessible name can result in a confusing experience for screen reader users. [Learn more about accessible names](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/label-content-name-mismatch).

items.snippet: <a class="usa-button usa-button--secondary  " aria-label="Open POSC Implementation Tool page" href="/topics/capta-plans-of-safe-care/posc-implementation-tool/">
items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  Text inside the element is not included in the accessible name
